items.title: From “System of Record” to “System of Intelligence”
items.summary: The reasoning layer that sits above the database, and that increasingly treats the database as infrastructure, is where a new generation of companies is being built.

items.title: Lovable just backed a company that’s looking to bring vibe coding to hardware
items.summary: Hardware company Atech raised $800,000 in pre-seed funding, including from a16z’s scout fund, Sequoia Scout Fund, and Nordic Makers.

items.title: equipifi Scores $34M Series B Financing
items.summary: SCOTTSDALE, AZ, equipifi, the fintech platform enabling banks and credit unions to offer flexible payment solutions natively within their digital banking experience, has announced the close of its $34-million Series B.
